arts.ttl: Manchester United’s Lisandro Martinez sends three-word message after major injury update
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the defender could return from injury for the Europa League clash against Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's astonishing cost of failure since Sir Alex Ferguson revealed in startling figures
arts.sum: Numerous managers have tried to fill the shoes of Sir Alex Ferguson at Man Utd since his retirement in 2013 - and all have failed to replicate his true success despite being backed financially

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim needs to deliver the Man United statement Erik ten Hag made for the right reasons
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has grand plans to overhaul Man United's identity.

arts.ttl: Man Utd ready bumper contract for Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: Manchester United wish to sign Napoli ’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and a sensational report has even suggested that they have offered him a contract. Kvaratskhelia is one that the club are looking at, according to Italian journalist Ciro Venerato via Tutto Napoli .

arts.ttl: Manchester United star's career could be revived after Ruben Amorim comment
arts.sum: Harry Maguire was set to be sold by Man United in January after losing his place under former manager Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Fans of Manchester and Merseyside clubs to stage protest this weekend against 'exploitation of loyal supporters' - with demonstrations against ticket price rises at Old Trafford and Anfield
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Protests will be carried out outside both Old Trafford and Anfield on Sunday, with supporters across English football's great divide 'standing shoulder to shoulder'.

arts.ttl: Latest Manchester United injury news as two miss Bodo/Glimt after Leny Yoro update
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as we take a look at the injury situation ahead of Ruben Amorim's first home game in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes sets Man United target ahead of Ruben Amorim Old Trafford debut
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Bruno Fernandes has set a target that he would like his side to achieve this season ahead of Thursday's Europa League tie against Bodo/Glimt

arts.ttl: Man Utd owed rivals £317m in transfer fees last year - now staggering figure has risen again
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's cost-cutting measures have not yet had the desired affect with Manchester United's debt soaring along with the amount they owe rival clubs in transfer fees

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans criticise ticket prices - as club reveals manager change costs
arts.sum: Supporter groups accuse Manchester United of exploiting their fans after taking a mid-season decision to raise matchday ticket prices.
